_comment: Ollama configuration template — Phase 2 stub. Copy to config.json (gitignored). Reference: plan §3.2 + §7.Q1.

ollama._bind_comment: Set to 'lan' to expose Ollama to LAN (multi-device). Default localhost-only for privacy.
ollama._tier_comment: Auto-selects model based on detected RAM: lite (4-8GB), standard (8-16GB), default (16-32GB), pro (32GB+). Override with explicit 'model' below.
ollama._model_comment: When set, takes precedence over tier. Examples: qwen3:14b, qwen3:8b, qwen3.6:27b. AVOID qwen3.5:* family (Ollama Issue #14493).
ollama._think_mode_comment: auto | always | never. 'auto' enables Qwen 3 hybrid thinking only for complexityEstimate > 30 (cost-aware).
